title: Runloop Benchmark Run
description: A BenchmarkRunView represents a run of a complete set of Scenarios, organized under a Benchmark or created by a BenchmarkJob.

benchmark_id.description: The ID of the Benchmark definition. Present if run was created from a benchmark definition.

start_time_ms.description: The time the benchmark run execution started (Unix timestamp milliseconds).

duration_ms.description: The duration for the BenchmarkRun to complete.

score.description: The final score across the BenchmarkRun, present once completed. Calculated as sum of scenario scores / number of scenario runs.

metadata.description: User defined metadata to attach to the benchmark run for organization.

environment_variables.description: Environment variables used to run the benchmark.

secrets_provided.description: User secrets used to run the benchmark. Example: {"DB_PASS": "DATABASE_PASSWORD"} would set the environment variable 'DB_PASS' on all scenario devboxes to the value of the secret 'DATABASE_PASSWORD'.
